summary: Delete data/vectordb/ and remove chromadb from requirements.txt / pyproject.toml; uninstall locally

resolution.note: data/vectordb/ removed (1.1 MB). README pip install no longer lists chromadb; the config section no longer mentions it. config/embedding.toml [backend] block dropped — storage is implicit (data/guru.db::chunk_embeddings). Code-side no imports of chromadb remain. 37 tests pass end-to-end.
